stories.title: stop.sh: direct squad activity call on leader skip
acceptanceCriteria: hooks/stop.sh directly calls 'multica squad activity <issue_id> failed --reason activity-not-recorded-by-agent' when leader marker detected AND squad-activity.marker absent
The direct call is made BEFORE writing squad-audit-warning (not instead of it)
multica CLI absence is handled gracefully (fall back to warning-only if multica not found)
bash -n hooks/stop.sh passes
shellcheck hooks/stop.sh reports no error-level findings
Smoke: stop.sh with leader marker + no activity marker → squad-audit-warning written AND multica call attempted

stories.title: session-start.sh: inject 3-strike counts + model env vars
acceptanceCriteria: hooks/session-start.sh reads .multica/state/<issue_id>/hitl-bounces.json and injects bounce counts into additionalContext when present
Format injected: 'HITL bounce count for <question_id>: N/3 (tier: leader|human)'
hooks/session-start.sh reads capabilities/claude-code.json model_routing field and exports MULTICA_MODEL_FAST, MULTICA_MODEL_STD, MULTICA_MODEL_DEEP env vars
When capabilities file or model_routing field absent: env vars default to haiku/sonnet/opus
bash -n hooks/session-start.sh passes
shellcheck hooks/session-start.sh reports no error-level findings
Smoke: fixture hitl-bounces.json with question_id=q1 count=2 → additionalContext contains 'bounce count for q1: 2/3'

stories.title: squad-member-workflow.md: bounce count written to file
acceptanceCriteria: skills/core/squad-member-workflow.md instructs member to write bounce count to .multica/state/<issue_id>/hitl-bounces.json on every [HITL:leader] escalation
File format documented: {"<question_id>": {"count": N, "last_at": "<ISO8601>", "tier": "leader"}}
question_id stability rule retained: generate once, reuse across bounces
Instruction uses <<cli:issue.metadata.set>> as fallback only, file write is primary
grep -E 'multica (issue|squad) [a-zA-Z]' skills/core/squad-member-workflow.md returns 0 (all CLI via anchors)

stories.title: capabilities/claude-code.json: model_routing field
acceptanceCriteria: capabilities/claude-code.json contains model_routing object with fast, standard, deep keys
Default values: fast=haiku, standard=sonnet, deep=opus
jq -e .model_routing capabilities/claude-code.json passes
jq -e . capabilities/claude-code.json passes (valid JSON)

stories.title: skills/advanced/subagent-dispatch.md: new skill
acceptanceCriteria: skills/advanced/subagent-dispatch.md exists and is <=200 lines
File contains model routing table: haiku (mechanical/single-file), sonnet (standard/multi-file), opus (architecture/review)
File contains fresh context principle: subagent prompt must include complete task context, never 'see issue for details'
File contains Task() call examples with subagent_type and model parameters
File references $MULTICA_MODEL_FAST, $MULTICA_MODEL_STD, $MULTICA_MODEL_DEEP env vars
File contains output format rule: subagent writes result to file or multica comment, not relied on return value
File contains Daemon-Safe Notes section

stories.title: multica-workflow.md: context budget awareness
acceptanceCriteria: skills/core/multica-workflow.md contains context budget rules in a dedicated section
Rules specify: >35% remaining = normal, <=35% = checkpoint before new work, <=25% = summarize and set blocked
Rules specify how to checkpoint: write progress comment via <<cli:issue.comment.add>> then continue or set blocked
Daemon-Safe Notes section updated to mention context budget awareness

stories.title: Smoke: all 44+ tests pass after v0.3.0 changes
acceptanceCriteria: bash tests/smoke/run-claude.sh exits 0 with FAIL: 0
All pre-existing scenarios (1-7) still pass
No regression in v0.1.0 or v0.2.0 behavior
